description:
A GPU-accelerated terminal emulator

Nova is a fast, GPU-accelerated terminal emulator built with Rust and iced.
0.24.0 (2026-05-19)
Features
- settings: add About tab with brand and version (4c833a5)
Bug Fixes
- macos: prevent premature expansion of NOVA_PROMPT_COMMAND in bash init (38dfc8c)
What's Changed
- fix(macos): prevent premature expansion of NOVA_PROMPT_COMMAND in bash init by @pmqueiroz in #117
- feat(settings): add About tab with brand and version by @pmqueiroz in #119
- chore(main): release 0.24.0 by @pmqueiroz in #118
